Name: Snapjaw
Description: Think of it as a shark made out of jagged glacier rock and bad intentions. This brute is adapted to the crushing cold, sporting a massive underbite that can snap through frozen decks and a pair of crimson fins that slice through slush like a hot knife. It’s a ruthless hunter from the depths of the frozen sea, utilizing those glowing red peepers to locate the faint warmth of anything dumb enough to swim in its territory.
